name: MA'EN JUTSU: YOUNI KASOUKU (FIENDFIRE TECHNIQUE: FIENDISH CELERITY )

description.value:
Type: Fuinjutsu

Rank: 7 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 21 | Successes: 5

Perform: 9 | Perform DC: 22

Components: C, E, F, S

You carve fiery runes into yourself, which becomes dormant until activated. While dormant, the runes increase your land speed by 5 ft.

The seal's activation and bonuses are identical to those of Ketsuyoujutsu: Kaisoku, and once activated it also disappears much like Kaisoku. This techniques takes up one seal slot, and you deal yourself 3 damage when performing it. Only one Fiendish Celerity or Fiendish Potence (see next technique) seal can be applied on you at the same time. This technique cannot be used more than once every 24 hours.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra and deal yourself 1 additional damage to increase the bonus on activation by +1 (up to +12 total).
